RemediationStrings.Title: NoLockScreenCamera (Administrative Templates - Control Panel)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Personalization\NoLockScreenCamera must be 1. Severity: Low. Category: Administrative Templates - Control Panel.

RemediationStrings.Title: NoLockScreenSlideshow (Administrative Templates - Control Panel)
RemediationStrings.Description: Registry: HKLM\Software\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\Personalization\NoLockScreenSlideshow must be 1. Severity: Low. Category: Administrative Templates - Control Panel.
